description: Dense-count subcategory v2. Density descriptors instead of explicit counts, since SDXL ignored 'exactly N' in v1. Goal: cover sparse/medium/dense ranges across diverse subjects so post-hoc labeling yields a wide count distribution.
style_prefix: photorealistic documentary photograph, overhead or elevated angle for clear visibility, even neutral lighting, no lens blur, no bokeh, sharp focus across the entire frame, no vignette, no artistic filter
negative: motion blur, soft focus, shallow depth of field, bokeh, lens flare, grainy film, stylized art, illustration, painting, cartoon, anime, watermark, text overlay, logo, signature, frame border, duplicate frame, split screen
generation_notes: No numeric counts in prompts — SDXL-turbo ignored them in v1. Rely on density language + layout cues. All ground-truth counts must be labeled post-hoc from the actual image.

subjects.prompt: elevated photograph of a handful of people standing far apart in an otherwise empty cobblestone plaza at midday, each person clearly separated from the others, neutral lighting, sharp focus, no crowd
elevated photograph of a moderate gathering of people standing in a plaza, clear gaps between most individuals, some light clustering near the center, overhead morning light, neutral paving
elevated photograph of a packed plaza at lunchtime, people shoulder to shoulder filling the frame, overhead angle looking down, sharp focus, urban daytime
top-down photograph of a small cluster of identical brown cardboard boxes placed apart on an otherwise empty grey warehouse floor, gaps between every box, studio lighting, sharp focus
top-down photograph of a loose grid of identical brown cardboard boxes on a grey warehouse floor, clear gaps between rows and columns, no stacking, single layer only, studio lighting
aerial photograph of widely spaced trees in a dry field, clear ground between every tree, no canopy overlap, overhead view, soft daylight, neutral earth tones
aerial photograph of a mature forest canopy from above, trees packed densely with overlapping foliage, variable tree shapes and sizes, daylight, photo
straight-on photograph of a single long retail shelf with identical clear glass bottles lined up end to end, studio lighting, white background behind the shelf, each bottle fully visible

flat graphic design wallpaper with a small loose grid of identical simple line-art bicycle icons on a pale grey background, generous spacing, plenty of empty background visible, black outline on white fill, no shadow, no gradient

flat graphic design wallpaper densely tiled with identical simple line-art leaf icons on a pale grey background, tight packing, minimal background visible, black outline on white fill, no shadow, no gradient
aerial photograph of a parking lot half full of cars, white painted lot lines clearly visible, some empty spaces between cars, overhead view, daylight, sharp focus
straight-down overhead photograph of a row of identical folding chairs arranged on a wooden floor, evenly spaced, no people, studio lighting, sharp focus from end to end
